basic_details.job_title: Bhadohi UP Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 87 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Jila Karyakram Adhikari (District Programme Officer), Bhadohi, has released a notification dated 20 July 2026 inviting online applications for the post of Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper) on a honorarium/contract basis. The recruitment is for previously sanctioned but currently vacant posts in Anganwadi Centres operating under the Child Development Projects (Bal Vikas Pariyojana) in the urban and rural areas of Bhadohi district. A total of 87 vacancies are available across 7 projects. Only female candidates can apply, and applications must be submitted online at https://upanganwadibharti.in.

important_dates.raw: Notification Date: 20 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: 21 July 2026 Online Application Last Date: 20 August 2026, till midnight 12:00 AM Age Reckoning Date: 1 July 2026

qualification.details: The minimum educational qualification for the post of Anganwadi Sahayika is Intermediate (12th) or its equivalent. The maximum qualification considered is up to Post Graduate level. Merit will be prepared based on the percentage of marks obtained in the qualifying examinations, and note that High School (10th) marks will not be included while preparing the merit list.

selection_process: Selection for the post of Anganwadi Sahayika under direct recruitment follows a defined order of priority among eligible resident candidates of the same gram sabha/ward:
First priority: A widow woman residing in the same gram sabha/ward (urban areas)
living below the poverty line (BPL). If a widow is not available
then a BPL abandoned woman or a legally divorced woman whose maintenance case has been accepted by a competent court will be considered. If neither is available
other women living below the poverty line will be considered. Second priority: If no widow
or abandoned BPL candidate is available under the first priority
candidates living above the poverty line will be considered for selection in the order mentioned in the government order.
Merit among eligible candidates is prepared based on the percentage of marks obtained from Intermediate up to Post Graduate qualifications (High School marks excluded).
how_to_apply: Read the notification carefully and check vacancy details for your gram sabha/ward.
Fill out the online application form carefully and accurately.
Upload self-attested, clear, and legible scanned copies of the required documents as specified on the online form.
Review all entered details before final submission, since offline documents will not be accepted under any circumstances.
Submit the application within the window of 21 July 2026 to 20 August 2026 (till midnight 12:00 AM).
important_instructions: Only online applications through https://upanganwadibharti.in will be accepted; offline/physical documents will not be accepted under any circumstances. Candidates are solely responsible for any errors made in the application form. Incomplete or erroneous applications will be rejected. A family already having a member working as Anganwadi Karyakatri at a centre cannot have another family member selected as Sahayika at the same centre. Income, residence, and caste certificates must be issued by a competent authority, digitally signed, and verifiable through the eDistrict UP portal. Detailed information regarding vacant posts can be obtained from the concerned Child Development Project Office or the District Programme Office, Bhadohi. The number of vacancies and reservation details are subject to change; the department's decision will be final in case of any discrepancy.

content_sections.heading: Bhadohi Anganwadi Sahayika Recruitment 2026 Notification Out
content_sections.text: The District Programme Officer (Jila Karyakram Adhikari), Bhadohi has released the Bhadohi Anganwadi Sahayika Recruitment 2026 notification (Patrank C-933, dated 20 July 2026) inviting online applications for 87 Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper) posts on a honorarium/contract basis. The recruitment is being conducted for vacant Anganwadi Centres under various Child Development Projects in Bhadohi district. Only eligible female candidates can apply online from 21 July 2026 to 20 August 2026 through the official portal. Project-wise vacancy details, reservation, eligibility conditions, and Gram Sabha/Ward-wise vacancy information are available on the official website and at the notice boards of the Vikas Bhawan, District Programme Office, Tehsils, Development Blocks, Nagar Palika, Nagar Panchayat, and Child Development Project Offices across the district. Notification : Bhadohi Anganwadi Sahayika Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Bhadohi Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Date: 20 July 2026 Online Application Start Date: 21 July 2026 Online Application Last Date: 20 August 2026, till midnight 12:00 AM Age Reckoning Date: 1 July 2026

content_sections.heading: Bhadohi Anganwadi - Vacancy Details (Project-wise)
content_sections.text: The 87 vacant posts of Anganwadi Sahayika are distributed across seven Child Development Projects in Bhadohi district, with category-wise reservation as follows: The centre-wise, ward-wise, and gram-sabha-wise breakup of these vacancies has been displayed on the notice boards of the Vikas Bhawan, District Programme Office, all Tehsils, Nagar Palika, Nagar Panchayat, Development Blocks, and Child Development Project Offices, and is also available on the official website. Note from the official notice: The number of vacancies and the reservation break-up may increase or decrease. If any discrepancy is found in vacancies or reservation, the department's decision after resolving the issue will be final.

content_sections.heading: Bhadohi Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Only female candidates are eligible to apply for these posts. The candidate must be a resident of the same Gram Sabha (for rural areas) or the same Ward (for urban areas) for which she is applying. The entire selection process is governed by Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3318/58-1-2025 (1917687) dated 17.09.2025, which can be obtained from the official UP Government website. As per the government order, if one member of a family is already working as an Anganwadi Karyakatri (Worker) at a particular Anganwadi Centre, another member of the same family is not eligible for selection as Sahayika at the same centre.

content_sections.heading: Bhadohi Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: The minimum educational qualification for the post of Anganwadi Sahayika is Intermediate (12th) or its equivalent. The maximum qualification considered is up to Post Graduate level. Merit will be prepared based on the percentage of marks obtained in the qualifying examinations, and note that High School (10th) marks will not be included while preparing the merit list.

rows.detail: Date of birth as recorded in the High School certificate/mark sheet

content_sections.heading: Bhadohi Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for the post of Anganwadi Sahayika under direct recruitment follows a defined order of priority among eligible resident candidates of the same gram sabha/ward: First priority: A widow woman residing in the same gram sabha/ward (urban areas), living below the poverty line (BPL). If a widow is not available, then a BPL abandoned woman or a legally divorced woman whose maintenance case has been accepted by a competent court will be considered. If neither is available, other women living below the poverty line will be considered. Second priority: If no widow, divorced, or abandoned BPL candidate is available under the first priority, candidates living above the poverty line will be considered for selection in the order mentioned in the government order. Merit among eligible candidates is prepared based on the percentage of marks obtained from Intermediate up to Post Graduate qualifications (High School marks excluded).

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: For widow candidates: Death certificate of husband and family register certificate issued by the Gram Panchayat Adhikari or the concerned Nagar Nikay (urban local body) For divorced/abandoned women: A valid legal order issued by a competent court Income certificate (issued by competent authority, digitally signed, and verifiable on the eDistrict UP portal, as per Revenue Section-9 Government Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Sa-9 dated 30.09.2021, as amended) Residence certificate (issued by competent authority, digitally signed and online-verifiable) Caste certificate, where applicable (issued by competent authority, digitally signed and online-verifiable) High School certificate/mark sheet (for date of birth proof) Educational qualification certificates from Intermediate up to Post Graduate level, as applicable Self-attested scanned copies of all relevant documents, as specified in the online application form

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Bhadohi Anganwadi Sahayika Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official portal: https://upanganwadibharti.in Read the notification carefully and check vacancy details for your gram sabha/ward. Fill out the online application form carefully and accurately. Upload self-attested, clear, and legible scanned copies of the required documents as specified on the online form. Review all entered details before final submission, since offline documents will not be accepted under any circumstances. Submit the application within the window of 21 July 2026 to 20 August 2026 (till midnight 12:00 AM).

content_sections.heading: Bhadohi Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only online applications through https://upanganwadibharti.in will be accepted; offline/physical documents will not be accepted under any circumstances. Candidates are solely responsible for any errors made in the application form. Incomplete or erroneous applications will be rejected. A family already having a member working as Anganwadi Karyakatri at a centre cannot have another family member selected as Sahayika at the same centre. Income, residence, and caste certificates must be issued by a competent authority, digitally signed, and verifiable through the eDistrict UP portal. Detailed information regarding vacant posts can be obtained from the concerned Child Development Project Office or the District Programme Office, Bhadohi. The number of vacancies and reservation details are subject to change; the department's decision will be final in case of any discrepancy.

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi Sahayika posts are vacant in Bhadohi in 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 87 Anganwadi Sahayika posts are vacant across the seven Child Development Projects of Bhadohi district: Aboli, Aurai, Gyanpur, Bhadohi, Suriyawan, Shahar, and Deegh.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Bhadohi Anganwadi Sahayika Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window is open from 21 July 2026 to 20 August 2026, till midnight 12:00 AM.

faq.question: Q3. Can male candidates apply for the Anganwadi Sahayika post?
faq.answer: No. As per the notification, only female candidates are eligible to apply for these posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is Intermediate (12th) or its equivalent. Candidates with qualifications up to Post Graduate level are also eligible, and merit is based on the percentage of marks (High School marks are not counted).

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Bhadohi Anganwadi Sahayika Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 35 years of age, with age calculated as on 1 July 2026, based on the High School certificate.

faq.question: Q6. Who gets priority in the selection of Anganwadi Sahayika?
faq.answer: Widow women living below the poverty line in the same gram sabha/ward get first priority, followed by BPL divorced/abandoned women, then other BPL women, and finally above-poverty-line candidates, as per the order defined in the government order.

faq.question: Q7. What salary or honorarium will an Anganwadi Sahayika receive?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify the salary or honorarium amount. Candidates should refer to the related government order or contact the District Programme Office, Bhadohi, for this information.

faq.question: Q8. Can two members of the same family be selected at the same Anganwadi Centre?
faq.answer: No. If one family member is already working as an Anganwadi Karyakatri at a centre, another member of the same family cannot be selected as Sahayika at that same centre.
